title: Device Schema Extensions to the System for Cross-Domain Identity Management (SCIM) Model
abstract: The initial core schema for the System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM) was designed for provisioning users.  This memo specifies schema extensions that enable provisioning of devices using various underlying bootstrapping systems such as Wi-Fi Easy Connect, FIDO device onboarding vouchers, Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) passcodes, and MAC Authenticated Bypass (MAB).
